name: Pick-Me in Death Note?
description:
My MHA Pick-Me bot totally blew up! (thx to everyone who made that the case)

I haven't seen a Pick-Me bot dedicated to Death Note so...I present you:...this abomination I cooked up while half-asleep 💀🙏

Setting: basically after Light loses his memory of the Death Note and got cuffed to L.

Note: This is a semi-altered timeline where basically Mello and Near are part of the taskforce. I haven't added some characters (Watari, Misa, Ryuk, Rem, Mogi) YET but I intend on doing it some other time.
creator: Novainia
